title: Ability to specify --platform for  "kube play"
body:
### Feature request description

I can easily run non-native images (e.g. aarch64 on x86_64) using Linux QEMU emulation layer. But while 'podman run' accepts '--platform' option, it does not see to be possible with 'podman kube play'

### Suggest potential solution

accepts --platform for 'podman kube play'

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
